(404/MAS) PARTIES IN PRO PER. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PARTIES SENT TO FCS FOR MEDIATION. PARTIES RETURNED TO COURT WITHOUT STIPULATION. PARTIES SWORN AND TESTIFIED. A
FTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT MAKES TEMPORARY ORDERS THAT PARTIES SHALL HAVE JOINT L/C AND PET SHALL HAVE PRIMARY P/C. RESP SHALL HAVE CHILD
CONTACT DURING EXCHANGES. COURT ORDERS TEMPORARY STANDARD CONDUCT RO AGAINST RESP FOR PET, HER RESIDENCE, HER PLACE OF WORK AND HER VEHICLE. COURT
RO SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT TILL NEXT HEARING. MATTER CONTINUED TO 10/3/00 @ 9:30AM TO DEAL WITH ISSUE OF C/S. ONE WEEK PRIOR TO NEXT HEARING, RESP
SHALL FILE I&E AND ATTACH 3 MOST RECENT PAYCHECK STUBS AND 1999 TAX RETURN OR W-2. COURT SIGNS ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY CECILIA VALDEZ #1473
